data_preservation.description: Keep existing values unchanged, only calculate for null values

processing_sequence.description: Apply calculation first, then null handling only for remaining nulls

fallback.description: If calculation cannot fill a value, leave it as null

data_preservation.description: Keep existing values, calculate for nulls with built-in default

processing_sequence.description: Calculation includes its own null handling logic, separate null_handling phase skipped

fallback.description: Calculation provides its own default (e.g., 'NO' for Submission_Closed)

data_preservation.description: Always recalculate and replace existing values

processing_sequence.description: Calculate for all rows, skip separate null handling

fallback.description: Initialize with empty/default value then aggregate

data_preservation.description: Preserve existing indices, only generate for new rows

processing_sequence.description: Generate indices for null values only

preserve_existing.description: Keep existing values, only operate on null values

overwrite_existing.description: Replace all values with calculated results

conditional_overwrite.description: Overwrite only when condition is met

calculation_timing.first: Calculate before null handling (standard for calculated columns)
calculation_timing.last: Calculate after null handling (rare, for dependent calculations)
calculation_timing.conditional: Calculate only if needed based on state

null_handling_timing.last_defense: Apply after calculation, only for remaining nulls
